parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event_type: 'remote-trigger', client_payload: { workflow: $json.body.workflow || '/health-check', branch: $json.body.branch || 'main', token: $json.body.token } }) }}

parameters.name: content
parameters.value:
☀️ **IronForge Morning Briefing** — Quota resettas!

1. Kör `/startup` i Antigravity
2. Kör `/triage` — process nya issues
3. Check Night Shift logs: `.agent/logs/`

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event_type: "doctor-code", client_payload: { pr_number: $("Fetch Open PRs").item.json.number, branch: $("Fetch Open PRs").item.json.head.ref, job_name: "reviewer-aggregator", logs_summary: "Auto-fixable suggestions: " + $json.autoFixableCount } }) }}

parameters.name: body
